release_notes: Trade status modal footer kept showing a stale `Exit HARD_EXIT` / `Short P&L` snapshot from the moment short legs closed, even while long legs stayed open and kept moving — the backend only writes `total_pnl` once the *entire* trade closes, so the footer never had a current figure to fall back to. It now shows a single `Total P&L` computed live from the same per-leg P&L already rendered in the legs table.
